name: Transport US Inc
recent_news: Operates as veteran-owned NEMT provider under AmeriGuard Systems Inc; no school district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator; NEMT only, owned by AmeriGuard. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Raj's Transport
recent_news: Operates as freight/trucking company (dry van, reefer, flatbed, drayage); not a student transport operator despite directory classification.
fit_notes: Freight/trucking carrier, not a school-bus operator. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Celebrity Wheelchair Trnsprtn
recent_news: Yellow Pages lists business as CLOSED at 3500 N State Road 7 Ste 106, Lauderdale Lakes; status uncertain.
fit_notes: Micro NEMT/wheelchair operator, likely closed. Not a school-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: A Trinity Wheelchair Trnsprtn
recent_news: Small NEMT operator offering wheelchair, pediatric, special-needs school transport, inter-facility and mental health transfers; no acquisition or growth news.
fit_notes: Tiny independent NEMT with some special-needs school transport overlap, but at ~2 employees and $119K rev too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in.

name: Pine Creek Transportation Svc
recent_news: Founded 2003 by David and Ann Burnell; remains family-owned NEMT provider focused on wheelchair (manual/power/pediatric) transport; no M&A activity.
fit_notes: Family-owned NEMT, not a school-bus contractor; pediatric wheelchair service is closest adjacency. Too small (sub-$50K rev, 1 employee) for Summit tuck-in.
